description: All text must meet WCAG AA contrast requirements
All tappable elements must meet minimum size
anti_pattern: Tiny icons without expanded hit areas

description: Interactive elements show clear focus indicators
Show spinner or skeleton during async operations
Display validation errors close to the problem field
anti_pattern: Errors only at top of form

description: Always use visible labels
Design for mobile first then scale up
Content must fit viewport width on mobile
Micro-interactions should be snappy
Animations should express cause and effect
Each screen should have one main action
Bottom navigation limited to top-level destinations
Back behavior should be consistent and expected
Show placeholder for content loading over 300ms
Defer loading of off-screen content
Full functionality available via keyboard
Meaningful images need descriptive alt text
Use icons or text in addition to color
Content stays within device safe areas
anti_pattern: Content under notch or gesture bar

description: Both themes must have equal contrast and clarity
